raw: {"questions":[{"label":"On your plate","name":"What feels most important on your plate right now, Sarah?","description":"Lets Sarah set the current work context before the review gets more pointed.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"self_read","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Impact evidence","name":"What piece of work best shows the impact you think you had this quarter?","description":"Forces a concrete example of impact rather than a general claim.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Visibility signal","name":"What did you do this quarter to make your work visible to the right stakeholders?","description":"Surfaces whether she is actively raising signal or relying on others to notice.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Friction point","name":"Where did cross-functional friction slow you down most this quarter?","description":"Identifies the specific collaboration point where execution met resistance.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Influence gap","name":"Where do you think your influence was weaker than your execution?","description":"Tests whether she sees the gap between doing the work and shaping outcomes.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Escalation judgment","name":"What kind of call did you hold too long before escalating this quarter?","description":"Probes decision-making under uncertainty and calibration of when to pull in help.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Stakeholder plan","name":"What is your plan for keeping stakeholders informed on the work that matters most?","description":"Checks whether she has a deliberate communication cadence instead of ad hoc updates.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Signal habits","name":"What habit would change how visible your impact is over the next quarter?","description":"Looks for one practical behavior change that would raise her signal without adding noise.","purpose":"competency","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next-quarter focus","name":"Given what we've covered, what do you want to work on first over the next quarter?","description":"Closes on a concrete priority and commitment without introducing a new thread.","purpose":"topic","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
